name: RL Research and Shadow Policy
scope_implemented: src/rl/environment.py — TradingEnv (gymnasium.Env); MultiDiscrete action space [4,2,3]; Box obs space (6 features); risk-adjusted cost-net reward; 4 stress modes (normal/no_edge/high_vol/toxic)
src/rl/reward.py — RiskAdjustedReward; RewardConfig; RewardState; fee/slippage/funding-net; drawdown/tail-loss/envelope-proximity penalties; bounded to [-10,10]
src/rl/trainer.py — LinearRLTrainer (cross-entropy method CEM); simulation training without PyTorch/GPU; stress test runner; snapshot/load
src/adaptation/policies/rl_policy.py — full RLPolicy replacing stub; trained via simulation; heuristic fallback; shadow mode only; RLPolicyStub backward-compat alias
configs/gates.yaml — RL-SIM gate (phase 12, depends_on LEARN-PROMO-S) + RL-SHADOW gate (phase 12, depends_on RL-SIM)
src/gates/checks.py — RL-SIM and RL-SHADOW registered in CHECKS registry
tests/test_phase12_rl.py — 50 tests across TradingEnv, RiskAdjustedReward, LinearRLTrainer, RLPolicy, envelope guard, controller, gate integration

rl_env_risk_adjusted_reward.evidence: src/rl/environment.py + src/rl/reward.py; reward is fee/slippage/funding-net with drawdown/tail/proximity penalties; verified in test_reward_bounded, test_skip_yields_zero, test_maker_cheaper_than_taker

bounded_action_head.evidence: TradingEnv.bounded_action_from() validates via action_space.validate(); RLPolicy.decide() always returns valid BoundedAction; envelope_guard.enforce() enforced on all RL actions; verified in TestRLEnvelopeGuard

simulation_training.evidence: LinearRLTrainer.train() (CEM, numpy only, no GPU); runs in 5 generations, 40 individuals by default; completes in <10s; gate check rl_simulation_training PASS

stress_tests_pass.evidence: trainer.run_stress_tests() covers normal/no_edge/high_vol/toxic; all rewards finite and bounded; verified in test_stress_tests_finite_bounded + rl_stress_tests_pass gate criterion

shadow_policy_logged.evidence: RLPolicy.decide() returns mode=SHADOW always; learner_log entries written with applied=False; verified in TestPhase12Gates.test_rl_shadow_gate_passes + rl_shadow_applied_false criterion

no_live_influence.evidence: RLPolicy has no LIVE_BOUNDED mode; controller SHADOW runs produce applied=False; rl_no_live_influence criterion PASS

no_forbidden_shortcuts.evidence: No live trading mode; no real exchange calls; no hardcoded secrets; no unversioned artifacts; gymnasium dep added, not SB3 (too heavy for runtime dep)

config_driven.evidence: EnvConfig, RewardConfig, TrainingConfig all dataclass configs; ENABLE_RL_SHADOW env var already in .env.example from Phase 1

tests.coverage_adaptation: adaptation/ module covered by phase12 + phase11 tests

assumptions_and_decisions: docs/decisions/phase12_rl_trainer_choice.md: Used cross-entropy method (CEM) with numpy instead of Stable-Baselines3. Reason: SB3 requires PyTorch (~1GB); AGENTS.md says SB3 'for prototyping' — CEM achieves the same gate-verification goals (environment, reward, training loop, shadow policy) without the dependency. SB3 can be wired in later via trainer.py if needed for production research.
docs/decisions/phase12_gymnasium_dep.md: Added gymnasium>=0.29 as main dependency (lightweight, no GPU). The TradingEnv is always available; heavy RL training runs in the worker-rl service.
RLPolicyStub backward-compat: kept as a subclass of RLPolicy with learner_id='rl_policy_stub_v1' so Phase 11 gate checks (which import RLPolicyStub) continue to work without modification.
RL gates marked blocks_live='if_rl_enabled' (not always blocking) because RL is research/shadow; live readiness only requires RL gates if ENABLE_RL_SHADOW=true.
known_gaps_risks: No SB3/PyTorch integration yet — the LinearRLTrainer (CEM) is prototype-grade. For production research, replace trainer._rollout() with SB3's PPO.learn() if SB3 is added as a dev dep.
TradingEnv uses synthetic observations only — real feature-pipeline data integration is a future step (Phase 13 or research extension).
RL policy training time scales with generations/population; gate checks use fast configs (3-5 gen, 8-10 pop) — longer production runs need a dedicated worker-rl process.
No online update in shadow mode (update() is a no-op) — consistent with AGENTS.md §21.4 which says RL trains offline only.
tested: yes — 50/50 phase12 tests pass; RL-SIM 7/7 PASS; RL-SHADOW 6/6 PASS; 447/447 full suite pass
next_step: Phase 13 — Controlled Live Readiness (SEC, DEPLOY, BACKUP, MON, CONFIG-FREEZE, LIVE gates)
